headline.purpose: Section headings, card titles, modal headers.

title.purpose: Subsection headings, table headers, list item titles.

body.purpose: Primary reading text, descriptions, form labels.

label.purpose: Caps-style labels, badges, metadata tags, button text.

shadows.name: ambient-low
shadows.purpose: Subtle lift for hover states on cards and buttons.

shadows.name: ambient-medium
shadows.purpose: Elevated surfaces — dropdowns, popovers, floating toolbars.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main action button. Engine Amber background with warm white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #d97706; color: #fafaf9; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #b45309; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(217, 119, 6, 0.2); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent with subtle border.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #ffffff; color: #44403c; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid #e7e5e4; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f5f5f4; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(217, 119, 6, 0.2); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Content container with flat rest state and subtle hover lift.
components.html:
Agent Configuration

Configure your agent's behavior and capabilities.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e7e5e4; border-radius: 8px; padding: 24px; transition: box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(28, 25, 23, 0.06), 0 1px 2px rgba(28, 25, 23, 0.04); } .ds-card-title { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #44403c; margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .ds-card-body { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: #57534e; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text field with amber focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #ffffff; color: #292524; padding: 8px 12px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; border: 1px solid #e7e5e4; border-radius: 6px; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #d97706; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(217, 119, 6, 0.2); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #a8a29e; }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Toggleable filter pill with full rounding.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-block; background: #f5f5f4; color: #57534e; padding: 4px 12px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-chip:hover { background: #e7e5e4; } .ds-chip.active { background: #d97706; color: #fafaf9; }

components.name: Navigation Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation item with amber active indicator.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: block; padding: 8px 12px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: #57534e; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 6px; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #f5f5f4; color: #44403c; } .ds-nav-item.active { background: #f5f5f4; color: #44403c; border-left: 3px solid #d97706; padding-left: 9px; }

narrative.overview: Agent Engine's interface should feel like a high-end piece of industrial equipment: every surface machined to purpose, every control exactly where an operator expects it, every feedback signal immediate and unambiguous. The aesthetic is warm technicality — warm stone neutrals and amber accent create an environment that feels inhabited by humans, while tight spacing, precise corners, and disciplined information hierarchy convey operational seriousness.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained color strategy with committed moments
Single sans-serif family (Inter) carrying all text roles
Flat-by-default surfaces; elevation through subtle border and shadow on interaction
8px base spacing grid with deliberate rhythm variation
Motion conveys state only: 150–250ms transitions, ease-out-quart easing

rules.name: The No Pure Black Rule
rules.body: #000000 and #ffffff are prohibited. Even our white surfaces are tinted warm.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Engine Amber appears on ≤10% of any internal tool screen. Its rarity is the point.

rules.name: The Tight Scale Rule
rules.body: Type scale ratio is 1.125–1.2 between steps. Exaggerated contrast creates noise in product UIs.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state or for true spatial separation.

dos: Do use Engine Amber for primary actions, active states, and key metrics.
Do maintain the 8px spacing grid with multiples of 4px.
Do use borders to separate cards and sections.
Do provide skeleton loading states for data surfaces.
Do ensure every interactive element has visible focus states.
Do use the mono font for technical values.
donts: Don't use the default Ant Design blue (#1890ff) anywhere.
Don't use glassmorphism as a default.
Don't create identical card grids with icon + heading + text repeated endlessly.
Don't use side-stripe borders except for sidebar navigation active indicator.
Don't use the hero-metric template on the Dashboard.
Don't use decorative motion that doesn't convey state.
Don't mix English and Chinese in the same UI surface.
Don't use display fonts or serif fonts for UI labels.
